query.name: SelectCanonicalByRandom
query.sql: SELECT r.send_state_id, r.canonical_message_id, c.peer_seq, c.date AS message_date, r.request_payload_hash FROM message_client_randoms r JOIN canonical_messages c ON c.canonical_message_id = r.canonical_message_id WHERE r.sender_user_id = :sender_user_id AND r.peer_type = :peer_type AND r.peer_id = :peer_id AND r.client_random_id = :client_random_id LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectCanonicalByID
query.sql: SELECT :send_state_id AS send_state_id, canonical_message_id, peer_seq, date AS message_date, :request_payload_hash AS request_payload_hash FROM canonical_messages WHERE canonical_message_id = :canonical_message_id LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectUserMessageByID
query.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, user_message_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, date AS message_date, outgoing FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id AND user_message_id = :user_message_id AND message_status = :message_status LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectUserMessageByGlobalID
query.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, user_message_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, date AS message_date, outgoing FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND user_message_id = :user_message_id AND message_status = :message_status LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectUserMessageByGlobalIDForDelete
query.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, user_message_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, date AS message_date, outgoing FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND user_message_id = :user_message_id LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectNearestLiveUserMessageByPeerSeq
query.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, user_message_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, date AS message_date, outgoing FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id AND peer_seq <= :peer_seq AND message_status = :message_status ORDER BY peer_seq DESC LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectHistoryMessages
query.sql: SELECT v.canonical_message_id, v.peer_seq, v.user_message_id, c.from_user_id, v.outgoing, v.peer_type, v.peer_id, v.message_kind, c.message_text, v.date AS message_date, v.view_payload FROM user_message_views v JOIN canonical_messages c ON c.canonical_message_id = v.canonical_message_id WHERE v.user_id = :user_id AND v.peer_type = :peer_type AND v.peer_id = :peer_id AND v.message_status = :message_status AND v.peer_seq > :min_peer_seq AND v.peer_seq < :max_peer_seq ORDER BY v.date DESC, v.peer_seq DESC LIMIT :limit

query.name: SearchHashTagMessages
query.sql: SELECT DISTINCT v.canonical_message_id, v.peer_seq, v.user_message_id, c.from_user_id, v.outgoing, v.peer_type, v.peer_id, v.message_kind, c.message_text, v.date AS message_date, v.view_payload FROM user_message_views v JOIN canonical_messages c ON c.canonical_message_id = v.canonical_message_id LEFT JOIN hash_tags h ON h.user_id = v.user_id AND h.peer_type = v.peer_type AND h.peer_id = v.peer_id AND h.hash_tag_user_message_id = v.user_message_id AND h.hash_tag = :hash_tag AND h.deleted = 0 WHERE v.user_id = :user_id AND v.peer_type = :peer_type AND v.peer_id = :peer_id AND v.message_status = :message_status AND (:offset_id <= 0 OR v.peer_seq < :offset_id_limit) AND ( h.hash_tag_user_message_id IS NOT NULL OR c.message_text LIKE :like_tag ) ORDER BY v.peer_seq DESC LIMIT :limit

query.name: SelectCanonicalByUserView
query.sql: SELECT v.canonical_message_id, v.peer_seq, v.user_message_id, c.from_user_id, v.outgoing, v.peer_type, v.peer_id, v.message_kind, c.message_text, v.date AS message_date, v.view_payload FROM user_message_views v JOIN canonical_messages c ON c.canonical_message_id = v.canonical_message_id WHERE v.user_id = :user_id AND v.peer_type = :peer_type AND v.peer_id = :peer_id AND v.peer_seq = :peer_seq AND v.message_status = :message_status LIMIT 1

query.name: SelectEditableMessageForUpdate
query.sql: SELECT c.canonical_message_id, c.peer_seq, c.from_user_id, c.peer_type, c.peer_id, c.message_kind, c.message_text, c.date AS message_date, COALESCE(c.edit_date, c.date) AS edit_date, c.edit_version FROM user_message_views v JOIN canonical_messages c ON c.canonical_message_id = v.canonical_message_id WHERE v.user_id = :actor_user_id AND v.peer_type = :peer_type AND v.peer_id = :peer_id AND v.peer_seq = :peer_seq AND v.message_status = :message_status LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

query.name: CountHistoryOffset
query.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS offset_from_id FROM user_message_views v JOIN user_message_views cur ON cur.user_id = :cur_user_id AND cur.peer_type = :cur_peer_type AND cur.peer_id = :cur_peer_id AND cur.peer_seq = :cur_peer_seq WHERE v.user_id = :user_id AND v.peer_type = :peer_type AND v.peer_id = :peer_id AND v.message_status = :message_status AND ( v.date > cur.date OR (v.date = cur.date AND v.peer_seq >= cur.peer_seq) )

query.name: SelectHistoryMessagesPage
query.sql: SELECT v.canonical_message_id, v.peer_seq, v.user_message_id, c.from_user_id, v.outgoing, v.peer_type, v.peer_id, v.message_kind, c.message_text, v.date AS message_date, v.view_payload FROM user_message_views v JOIN canonical_messages c ON c.canonical_message_id = v.canonical_message_id WHERE v.user_id = :user_id AND v.peer_type = :peer_type AND v.peer_id = :peer_id AND v.message_status = :message_status ORDER BY v.date DESC, v.peer_seq DESC LIMIT :offset, :limit

query.name: SelectConversationViewPeerSeqFloor
query.sql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(peer_seq), 0) + 1 AS peer_seq_floor FROM user_message_views WHERE peer_type = :peer_type AND ( (user_id = :user_id AND peer_id = :peer_id) OR (user_id = :other_user_id AND peer_id = :other_peer_id) )
